name: Tomato Salsa
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup packed fresh cilantro leaves, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped tomatoes, cilantro, red-wine vinegar, onion, jalapeno chiles, and olive oil in a bowl.
2. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
3. Allow the salsa to cool before serving or storing it in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 2 days.
